name: duckdb-bun-shim
description: Use DuckDB as the engine behind Bun's native bun:sqlite / Bun.SQL via a static SQLite-ABI shim. require("duckdb-bun-shim") returns the prebuilt dylib path.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const f=require('node:fs'),p='darwin-arm64.dylib darwin-x64.dylib linux-x64.so linux-arm64.so'.split(' ');for(const b of p){if(!f.existsSync('prebuilt/'+b)){console.error('MISSING prebuilt/'+b+' — run CI build first');process.exit(1)}}console.log('core prebuilt binaries present')"
